case_title: DANIELLE ALLEN VS. JOHN L. KING IV

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,452.00 FILED BY ALLEN, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-14-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NO EXHIBIST RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DANIELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L. $2,452.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,537.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L. AS TO PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DANIELLE
PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DANIELLE PETITION MAILED ON OCT 01, 2012
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S PETITION TO SET ASIDE. FILED BY DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SET FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT IS GRANTED BY: JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO-.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $750.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $134.77 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,009.04 AS TO DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
DEBTORS REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR REVIEW) FILED BY DEFENDANT KING IV, JOHN L.
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: JANUARY, 10, 2012).
